summary: Ultimate Care is a comprehensive health insurance plan that offers unlimited sum insured along with premium payback benefit. It provides financial security from treatment costs and pays back base premium if no claims are made for 5 consecutive years. The plan includes loyalty rewards for staying healthy long-term and offers various optional benefits.
coverage: In-Patient Care up to Sum Insured
Day Care Treatment - All day care procedures up to Sum Insured
Advance Technology Methods up to Sum Insured
Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses - 60 days prior to hospitalization up to Sum Insured
Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses - 90 days after discharge up to Sum Insured
AYUSH Treatment up to Sum Insured
Domiciliary Hospitalization up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor Cover up to Sum Insured
Ambulance Cover up to Sum Insured - Any mode of transport such as Road/Air/Train/Boat
Room Rent up to Sum Insured
ICU Cover up to Sum Insured
New Born coverage with wait period benefit
Unlimited E-Consultations with general physicians and specialists
Physical Consultations with General Physicians up to ₹5,000 per insured, ₹500 per consultation
Physical Consultations with Specialist Doctors up to ₹5,000 per insured, ₹500 per consultation
waiting_periods: Initial waiting period: 30 days (not applicable on accident cases)
PED wait period can be modified to 1 year/2 years with optional benefit
Wait Period waived off for New Born if added within 90 days of birth
Waiting Period waived off for additional Sum Insured if no hospitalization claim made in 7 preceding Policy Years
room_rent: Room Rent covered up to Sum Insured
co_pay: OPD General Physician consultations: 10% co-payment, maximum ₹1,000 reimbursement per consultation
OPD Specialist consultations: 5% co-payment, maximum ₹2,000 reimbursement per consultation
claims_information: Unlimited Automatic Recharge available for unlimited times for unrelated or same illness from subsequent claim
Claim Shield - Policy remains active during grace period with hospitalization expenses coverage
Unlimited Care covers specified list of items (list I, II, III and IV) that are non-payable up to Sum Insured
Company awarded 'Best Claim Settlement Company of The Year' at 9th Annual India Insurance Summit & Awards 2025

faqs.question: What is the Premium Payback benefit?
faqs.answer: If no hospitalization related claim is made for 5 consecutive Policy Years, the 1st Policy Year premium of base plan shall be refunded in every block of 5 years subject to subsequent renewal of Policy. Base premium excludes optional benefits.

faqs.question: What is the Infinity Bonus benefit?
faqs.answer: This benefit provides 100% of Base Sum Insured per year irrespective of claim for unlimited times on continuous renewal of policy. The bonus shall not reduce in case of claim.

faqs.question: What is the Loyalty Boost benefit?
faqs.answer: An additional 100% of the SI as bonus - equivalent to the first policy year's sum insured will be added to the policy coverage after 7 consecutive claim-free years, once in a policy lifetime.

faqs.question: What are the available Sum Insured options?
faqs.answer: Sum Insured options available are ₹5L, ₹7L, ₹10L, ₹15L, ₹20L, ₹25L, ₹50L, ₹1Cr, and Unlimited.

faqs.question: What is the entry age for adults?
faqs.answer: Entry age for adults is minimum 18 years with no upper age limit.

faqs.question: What is the entry age for children?
faqs.answer: Entry age for children is minimum 91 days and maximum 24 years (last birthday).

faqs.question: What is the exit age for coverage?
faqs.answer: Exit age for adults is lifelong and for children is 25 years.

faqs.question: What tenure options are available?
faqs.answer: Tenure options available are 1, 2, or 3 years.

faqs.question: Who can be covered under this policy?
faqs.answer: Self, Spouse/Live-in partner/Same sex partner, Son, Daughter, Father, Mother, Mother-in-law, Father-in-law, Grand-Father, Grand-Mother and as per insurable interest can be covered.

faqs.question: What is the maximum number of persons that can be covered?
faqs.answer: Individual coverage: Maximum up to 6 persons. Floater coverage: Maximum up to 2 Adults and 2 Children (2A2C).

faqs.question: What is the Welcome Discount benefit?
faqs.answer: New policy buyers get up to 30% discount on premium. Discounts are available only for the first 3 years - 30% discount in first year, 20% discount in second year and 10% discount in 3rd year.

faqs.question: What are MediVouchers?
faqs.answer: Two pharmacy vouchers worth ₹250 each per policy are provided upon the first policy renewal to ease out-of-pocket expenses and make medical expenses more affordable.

faqs.question: How does the Wellness Discount work?
faqs.answer: You can enjoy up to 30% discount on renewal premiums with healthy days program on Care Health Customer App. The discount is based on number of days completing 10,000 steps (8,000 steps for age 60+ years).

faqs.question: What is the Tenure Multiplier benefit?
faqs.answer: This benefit allows you to combine annual Sum Insured of multi-year policy for a single claim in a policy tenure. Only one claim is payable in the entire policy term under this benefit.

faqs.question: What is covered under pre-hospitalization expenses?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization medical expenses are covered for 60 days prior to hospitalization up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What is covered under post-hospitalization expenses?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalization medical expenses are covered for 90 days after discharge up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatment is covered up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: What ambulance services are covered?
faqs.answer: Ambulance cover includes any mode of transport such as Road, Air, Train, Boat etc. up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: How does the Cumulative Bonus work?
faqs.answer: Cumulative Bonus provides 50% of Base SI per year irrespective of claim, maximum up to 100%. It shall not reduce in case of claim.

faqs.question: What health services are included?
faqs.answer: Health services include Health Portal with Doctor on chat, Healthy tips reminder, and Discount Connect offering discounts on services such as consultations, diagnostics, maternity etc at network providers.

faqs.question: How many physical consultations with general physicians are allowed?
faqs.answer: Maximum 4 physical consultations per Insured per policy year with general physicians subject to maximum ₹500 per consultation.

faqs.question: How many physical consultations with specialists are allowed?
faqs.answer: Maximum 4 physical consultations per Insured per policy year with listed specialist doctors subject to maximum ₹500 per consultation.

faqs.question: What is the Be-fit Plus benefit?
faqs.answer: Be-fit Plus includes recording 10,000 steps (8,000 steps for age 60+) daily, access to Digital Fitness Coaching, AI Fitness Coaching, and Nutritionist/Wellness Coach. Unlimited access to Fitness centres is available for members aged above 12 years.

faqs.question: What is the Grace Period Coverage?
faqs.answer: Your policy remains active ensuring continuous protection during the grace period. Only coverage under the hospitalization expenses benefit shall be provided during this period.

faqs.question: What is the PED Wait Period Modification benefit?
faqs.answer: If insured person has pre-existing diseases (Diabetes/Hypertension/Hyperlipidemia/Asthma/Obesity/Hypothyroidism/Coronary Artery Disease) at policy issuance, the PED wait period shall be waived off. Coverage starts from 31st day after serving initial 30-day wait period.

faqs.question: What are the pricing zones?
faqs.answer: Zone 1: Delhi NCR, Surat, Mathura, Aligarh. Zone 2: Telangana, Mumbai (MMR), Ahmedabad, Vadodra, Nashik. Zone 3: Pune, Indore, Bengaluru Urban, Rest of Gujarat. Zone 4: Rest of India.

faqs.question: What is Unlimited Care benefit?
faqs.answer: Unlimited Care covers specified list of items (list I, II, III and IV) that are typically non-payable, up to the Sum Insured.

faqs.question: How does the wellness discount calculation work?
faqs.answer: Discount is based on healthy days: 270+ days = 30%, 240+ days = 20%, 180+ days = 15%, 120+ days = 10%, Less than 120 days = 0%. Steps in last 2 months of policy period are not considered for renewal discount.

faqs.question: What OPD benefits are available?
faqs.answer: OPD benefits include consultations with general physicians (₹1,000 max with 10% co-pay) and specialist consultations (₹2,000 max with 5% co-pay). Each insured gets 4 consultations per year for each category.

faqs.question: Which benefits are not applicable with unlimited Sum Insured?
faqs.answer: Cumulative bonus, unlimited automatic recharge, loyalty boost, Infinity bonus, unlimited care & tenure multiplier benefits are not applicable with unlimited Sum Insured option.

source_file: Ultimate Care Brochure with Care OPD_Feb26.txt
